## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally via `npm start` and visually verified in browser
- [ ] No console errors or warnings introduced
- [ ] Ran `npm run build-client` and it compiled cleanly
- [ ] Updated README if anything about setup or deployment changed
- [ ] `robots.txt` updated if new public-facing pages were added
